name: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.0 - 2x DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H AX DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4 support, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for budget-conscious builders.
